'''Dalmeidan Kretch''' was a minor [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] bureaucrat and part-time [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. To almost everyone who knew him, Kretch was a lonely, unhappy man with a domineering spouse and a minor position in his planet's bureaucracy. However, his frequent "business trips" were actually spent pursuing fugitives from Imperial justice. Kretch used his connections in the Imperial bureaucracy to get the information necessary for his hunts. He hoarded the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from his [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]], intending to save up enough to leave his mundane existence for good.

While on the hunt, Kretch carried a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]], a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]], [[Stun grenade/Legends|stun grenades]], and various explosive devices. He also wore a light [[Blast vest/Legends|protective vest]].
